title: biscutella laevigata subsp. cuneata
intro: Biscutella laevigata subsp. cuneata, also known as the cuneate biscutella, is a plant species belonging to the family Brassicaceae. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant is also believed to have health benefits, including antioxidant and immunomodulatory properties, which may help protect against oxidative stress and support immune system function. Biscutella laevigata subsp. cuneata can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and decoctions, allowing for its potential benefits to be harnessed through traditional herbal medicine.
